steps.title: Separate the two clauses
steps.content: The first clause says evidence showed Machu Picchu was occupied earlier. The next clause begins with In 1420 CE and can stand as its own sentence, so the boundary needs a full stop.

steps.title: Avoid comma splices
steps.content: B joins independent clauses with only a comma. C creates a confusing which construction, and D fuses the clauses without punctuation. The answer is A.
